member.name: T:StarterApp.Converters.BoolToTextConverter
member.summary: Converts bool to one of two strings. parameter format: trueText|falseText (e.g. Update|Create).

member.name: T:StarterApp.Converters.InvertedBoolConverter
member.summary: Converts a boolean value to its inverse (true becomes false, false becomes true)

member.name: T:StarterApp.Converters.StringToBoolConverter
member.summary: Converts a string to a boolean value Returns true if the string is not null, empty, or whitespace Returns false if the string is null, empty, or whitespace

member.name: T:StarterApp.Services.IRentalService
member.summary: Shared rental pricing and eligibility helpers (ViewModels stay thin).

member.name: M:StarterApp.Services.IRentalService.GetInclusiveRentalDays(System.DateOnly,System.DateOnly)
member.summary: Inclusive calendar days from start through end (same rule as local ).

member.name: M:StarterApp.Services.IRentalService.CanOfferRent(StarterApp.Database.Models.Item,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Whether the Rent action should be offered for this item and user.

member.name: T:StarterApp.Services.IShellNavigation
member.summary: Shell GoToAsync abstraction for unit tests (avoids in ViewModels).

member.name: T:StarterApp.Services.IUiDialogs
member.summary: Page alert abstraction for unit tests (avoids in ViewModels).

member.name: M:StarterApp.Services.IUiDialogs.DisplayConfirmAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Two-button confirm; returns true if the user accepts.

member.name: M:StarterApp.Services.IUiDialogs.DisplayInfoAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Single-button informational alert.

member.name: T:StarterApp.Services.NoOpUiDialogs
member.summary: Design-time / headless: alerts do nothing or return false.

members.member: @brief View model for the About page that displays application information @details Provides basic application information including name, version, and links to more information
@brief Gets the application title from AppInfo @return The application name as a string
@brief Gets the application version from AppInfo @return The application version string
@brief Gets the URL for more information about the application @return URL string pointing to MAUI documentation
@brief Gets a descriptive message about the application technology stack @return Description of the app's technology stack
@brief Command to show more information about the application @details Opens the MoreInfoUrl in the default browser
@brief Initializes a new instance of the AboutViewModel class @details Sets up the ShowMoreInfoCommand with async relay command
@brief Authentication service for managing user authentication
@brief Navigation service for managing page navigation
@brief Collection of dynamic menu bar items @details Observable collection that can be modified at runtime based on user permissions
@brief Default constructor for design-time support @details Sets the title to "StarterApp"
@brief Determines if guest actions can be executed @return True if the current user has the "Guest" role
@brief Determines if user actions can be executed @return True if the current user has the "OrdinaryUser" role
@brief Determines if admin actions can be executed @return True if the current user has the "Admin" role
@brief Determines if authenticated actions can be executed @return True if the user is authenticated
@brief Navigates to the current user's profile page @return A task representing the asynchronous navigation operation
@brief Navigates to the current user's settings page @return A task representing the asynchronous navigation operation

member.summary: The backing field for .

member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.AppShellViewModel.LogoutCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

members.member: @brief Indicates whether the view model is currently performing a busy operation @details Observable property that can be bound to UI elements to show loading states
@brief The title of the current page or view @details Observable property that can be bound to page titles or headers
@brief The current error message, if any @details Observable property that stores error messages for display to the user
@brief Indicates whether there is currently an error @details Observable property that indicates if an error state exists
@brief Clears the current error state @details Resets both ErrorMessage and HasError properties
@brief Command to clear the current error state @details Relay command that calls ClearError method

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.BaseViewModel.clearErrorCommandCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.BaseViewModel.ClearErrorCommandCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for creating or editing a single Item

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel._initLock
member.summary: Prevents overlapping InitializeAsync calls (Shell can fire ApplyQueryAttributes and OnAppearing so close together that two EF operations run on the same DbContext).

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel._latitude
member.summary: Coordinates from API when editing (PUT must send lat/long).

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel.InitializeAsync(System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Load categories and optionally load an existing Item

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel.SaveAsync
member.summary: Save Item (create or update)

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel.DeleteAsync
member.summary: Delete the current Item

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel.saveCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel.SaveCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel.deleteCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel.DeleteCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel.cancelCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.CreateItemViewModel.CancelCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemDetailViewModel
member.summary: Read-only view model for a single item (title, description, rate, category, owner, etc.).

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemDetailViewModel.canEdit
member.summary: True when the signed-in user is the listing owner (edit is allowed).

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemDetailViewModel.canRent
member.summary: Show Rent when the user may request a rental (not owner, available, signed in).

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemDetailViewModel.isRefreshing
member.summary: Pull-to-refresh on the details page (reload from API/DB).

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemDetailViewModel.HasCategory
member.summary: Category badge visibility (avoid nested Item.Category.* bindings that can fault when Category is null).

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemDetailViewModel.ApplyQueryIdAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Parses Shell query id and loads the item (keeps error handling inside the VM).

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemDetailViewModel.LoadAsync(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Load item by id from the repository (local DB or API).
member.param: When true, skip the full-screen busy overlay (pull-to-refresh only).

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemDetailViewModel.RefreshAsync
member.summary: Reload the current item (e.g. after editing on another page).

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemDetailViewModel.OnItemChanged(StarterApp.Database.Models.Item)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemDetailViewModel.OnCanEditChanged(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemDetailViewModel.OnCanRentChanged(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: T:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for displaying items — uses so the same UI works with local PostgreSQL or the shared REST API.

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.items
member.summary: Observable collection of items (auto-updates UI when changed)

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.categories
member.summary: All categories for filter picker

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.selectedCategory
member.summary: Picker selection (Id 0 = all categories). Must match the category filter on the items list page.

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.isRefreshing
member.summary: Whether we're refreshing the list

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.InitializeAsync
member.summary: Load categories and items

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.LoadCategoriesAsync
member.summary: Load all categories

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.LoadItemsAsync
member.summary: Load items (filtered by category if selected)

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.AddItemAsync
member.summary: Navigate to create new item

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.OpenItemDetailAsync(StarterApp.Database.Models.Item)
member.summary: Navigate to read-only item details.

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.EditItemAsync(StarterApp.Database.Models.Item)
member.summary: Navigate to edit existing item

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.DeleteItemAsync(StarterApp.Database.Models.Item)
member.summary: Delete an item with confirmation

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.RefreshAsync
member.summary: Refresh the items list (pull-to-refresh)

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.ItemsListViewModel.OnSelectedCategoryChanged(StarterApp.Database.Models.Category)
member.summary: Called when the user changes the category filter (not when we assign after loading the list from the API).

members.member: @brief Authentication service for managing user login
@brief Navigation service for managing page navigation
@brief The user's email address @details Observable property bound to the email input field
@brief The user's password @details Observable property bound to the password input field
@brief Whether to remember the user's login credentials @details Observable property bound to the remember me checkbox
@brief Indicates whether a login operation is in progress @details Observable property that notifies the LoginCommand when changed
@brief Default constructor for design-time support @details Sets the title to "Login"

members.member: @brief Authentication service for managing user authentication
@brief Navigation service for managing page navigation
@brief The currently authenticated user @details Observable property containing the current user's information
@brief Welcome message displayed to the user @details Observable property showing a personalized welcome message
@brief Indicates whether the current user has admin privileges @details Observable property used to control visibility of admin features
@brief Default constructor for design-time support @details Sets the title to "Dashboard"
@brief Loads the current user's data and sets up the dashboard @details Retrieves current user information and determines admin status
@brief Navigates to create item (registered route only — same as MainPage, not a duplicate Shell tab).

members.member: @brief Authentication service for managing user authentication
@brief Navigation service for managing page navigation
@brief The current user's profile information @details Observable property containing the current user's data
@brief The user's current password for verification @details Observable property bound to the current password input field
@brief The user's new password @details Observable property bound to the new password input field
@brief Confirmation of the user's new password @details Observable property bound to the confirm new password input field
@brief Indicates whether the password change mode is active @details Observable property that controls the visibility of password change fields
@brief Loads the current user's profile data @details Retrieves the current user's information from the authentication service
@brief Toggles the password change mode @details Relay command that shows/hides password change fields and clears data when hiding
@brief Clears all password input fields @details Resets all password-related properties to empty strings

members.member: @brief Authentication service for managing user registration
@brief Navigation service for managing page navigation

@brief The user's password @details Observable property bound to the password input field

members.member: @brief Gets the application title from AppInfo @return The application name as a string
@brief Gets the application version from AppInfo @return The application version string
@brief Gets a placeholder message @return A message indicating this is a placeholder page
@brief Initializes a new instance of the TempViewModel class @details Default constructor with no initialization logic

member.name: T:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for managing user details including creation, editing, and role management. Handles both new user creation and existing user modification scenarios.
member.remarks: This ViewModel provides comprehensive user management functionality including: - User creation with password validation - User profile editing - Role assignment and removal - User deletion (soft delete) - Input validation and error handling

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._context
member.summary: Database context for data operations

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._navigationService
member.summary: Navigation service for page transitions

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._authService
member.summary: Authentication service for user role verification

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._userId
member.summary: The ID of the user being edited (0 for new users)

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._currentUser
member.summary: The current user entity being edited

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._firstName
member.summary: User's first name

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._lastName
member.summary: User's last name

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._email
member.summary: User's email address

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._password
member.summary: User's password (for new users only)

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._confirmPassword
member.summary: Password confirmation field

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._isActive
member.summary: Whether the user account is active

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._isLoading
member.summary: Loading state indicator

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._isNewUser
member.summary: Flag indicating if this is a new user creation

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._errorMessage
member.summary: Error message to display to user

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._successMessage
member.summary: Success message to display to user

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel._availableRoles
member.summary: Collection of all available roles for assignment

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.#ctor(StarterApp.Database.Data.AppDbContext,StarterApp.Services.INavigationService,StarterApp.Services.IAuthenticationService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the UserDetailViewModel class.
member.param: The database context for data operations
The navigation service for page transitions
The authentication service for role verification

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the user ID. Setting this property triggers user loading.
member.value: The user ID (0 for new users)

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.FirstName
member.summary: Gets or sets the user's first name.
member.value: The first name of the user

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.LastName
member.summary: Gets or sets the user's last name.
member.value: The last name of the user

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.Email
member.summary: Gets or sets the user's email address.
member.value: The email address of the user

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.Password
member.summary: Gets or sets the user's password (visible only for new users).
member.value: The password for new user accounts

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.ConfirmPassword
member.summary: Gets or sets the password confirmation field.
member.value: The password confirmation string

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.IsActive
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the user account is active.
member.value: True if the user account is active, false otherwise

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.IsLoading
member.summary: Gets or sets the loading state of the view model.
member.value: True if an operation is in progress, false otherwise

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.IsNewUser
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this is a new user creation scenario.
member.value: True if creating a new user, false if editing existing user

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message to display to the user.
member.value: The error message string

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.SuccessMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the success message to display to the user.
member.value: The success message string

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.AvailableRoles
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of available roles for assignment.
member.value: Observable collection of role items

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.PageTitle
member.summary: Gets the page title based on whether this is a new user or edit scenario.
member.value: "Create New User" for new users, "Edit User" for existing users

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.ShowPasswordFields
member.summary: Gets whether password fields should be shown (only for new users).
member.value: True if password fields should be visible, false otherwise

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.CanDeleteCurrentUser
member.summary: Gets whether the current user can be deleted (not new user and not the currently logged-in user).
member.value: True if the user can be deleted, false otherwise

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.SaveUserCommand
member.summary: Command to save the user (create or update)

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.DeleteUserCommand
member.summary: Command to delete the user

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.AddRoleCommand
member.summary: Command to add a role to the user

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.RemoveRoleCommand
member.summary: Command to remove a role from the user

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.BackCommand
member.summary: Command to navigate back to the user list

members.member: @brief Navigates to the dashboard page @return A task representing the asynchronous navigation operation

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.LoadUserAsync
member.summary: Loads user data based on the current UserId. For UserId = 0, initializes new user creation mode. For UserId > 0, loads existing user data from database.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation
member.exception: Thrown when user doesn't have admin role

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.CanSaveUser
member.summary: Determines whether the save user command can be executed.
member.returns: True if the save command can be executed, false otherwise
member.remarks: Validates that required fields are filled and for new users, password fields are completed.

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.SaveUserAsync
member.summary: Saves the user data (creates new user or updates existing user).
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous save operation
member.exception: Thrown when validation fails or duplicate email exists

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.CreateUserAsync
member.summary: Creates a new user in the database with the specified details and roles.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous create operation
member.exception: Thrown when a user with the same email already exists

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.UpdateUserAsync
member.summary: Updates an existing user's information in the database.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous update operation
member.exception: Thrown when email is already used by another user

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.CanDeleteUser
member.summary: Determines whether the delete user command can be executed.
member.returns: True if the delete command can be executed, false otherwise

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.DeleteUserAsync
member.summary: Performs a soft delete of the current user after confirmation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous delete operation
member.remarks: This method performs a soft delete by setting IsActive to false and DeletedAt timestamp. It also deactivates all associated user roles.

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.AddRoleAsync(StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem)
member.summary: Adds a role to the current user.
member.param: The role to add to the user
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous add role operation
member.remarks: Only works for existing users (not new user creation mode).

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.RemoveRoleAsync(StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem)
member.summary: Removes a role from the current user.
member.param: The role to remove from the user
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous remove role operation
member.remarks: Performs a soft delete by marking the user role as deleted rather than physically removing it.

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.ValidateInput
member.summary: Validates all user input fields.
member.returns: True if all validation passes, false otherwise
member.remarks: Validates required fields, email format, and password requirements for new users. Sets appropriate error messages when validation fails.

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.IsValidEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Validates email address format using regular expression.
member.returns: True if email format is valid, false otherwise

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.NavigateBackAsync
member.summary: Navigates back to the user list page.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous navigation operation

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.ClearMessages
member.summary: Clears both error and success messages.

member.name: E:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.PropertyChanged
member.summary: Occurs when a property value changes.

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.OnPropertyChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Raises the PropertyChanged event for the specified property.
member.param: The name of the property that changed

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.navigateToDashboardCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserDetailViewModel.NavigateToDashboardCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem
member.summary: Represents a role item in the user interface with assignment state.
member.remarks: This class is used to display roles in the UI with the ability to track whether the role is assigned to the current user and provide appropriate button text and colors for add/remove actions.

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem._isAssigned
member.summary: Flag indicating whether this role is assigned to the current user

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the role.
member.value: The role ID

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the role.
member.value: The role name

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the role.
member.value: The role description

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem.IsAssigned
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this role is assigned to the current user.
member.value: True if the role is assigned, false otherwise
member.remarks: Setting this property also updates the ButtonText and ButtonColor properties.

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem.ButtonText
member.summary: Gets the text to display on the action button.
member.value: "Remove" if assigned, "Add" if not assigned

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem.ButtonColor
member.summary: Gets the color for the action button.
member.value: Red (#dc3545) if assigned, Green (#28a745) if not assigned

member.name: E:StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem.PropertyChanged
member.summary: Occurs when a property value changes.

member.name: M:StarterApp.ViewModels.RoleItem.OnPropertyChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Raises the PropertyChanged event for the specified property.
member.param: The name of the property that changed

member.name: T:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserListItem
member.summary: Row model for list items (compiled bindings).

member.name: T:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserListViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for displaying the current logged-in user's profile. Data is fetched from the API (/users/me).

member.name: F:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserListViewModel.loadUserCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:StarterApp.ViewModels.UserListViewModel.LoadUserCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:StarterApp.Views.CreateItemPage
member.summary: Uses so ?id= is applied reliably on Android/iOS (Shell often does not expose the query string on ).

member.name: T:StarterApp.Views.ItemDetailsPage
member.summary: Uses so ?id= is applied reliably on Android/iOS (Shell often does not expose the query string on ).

member.name: P:StarterApp.Views.ItemDetailsPage.ItemId
member.summary: Bound from route ItemDetailsPage?id=123.

member.name: T:StarterApp.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs
